features.name: String utilities

scenarios.name: A simple palindrome
scenarios.rule: Palindromes are detected ignoring case and punctuation

steps.text: the string "racecar" should be a palindrome

scenarios.name: A palindrome with mixed case and punctuation
scenarios.rule: Palindromes are detected ignoring case and punctuation

steps.text: I reverse the string "A man, a plan, a canal: Panama"
the string "A man, a plan, a canal: Panama" should be a palindrome

scenarios.name: A non-palindrome
scenarios.rule: Palindromes are detected ignoring case and punctuation

steps.text: the string "behave" should not be a palindrome

scenarios.name: Title case conversion
scenarios.rule: Text is transformed into title-case and slug form

steps.text: I convert "the quick brown fox" to title case
the result should be "The Quick Brown Fox"

scenarios.name: Slugify conversion
scenarios.rule: Text is transformed into title-case and slug form

steps.text: I slugify "Hello World! This is Behave 101"

features.description:
As a developer
I want to manipulate strings
So that I can demonstrate Gherkin v6 Rule blocks
